name: Chainstack
description: Chainstack — Managed blockchain infrastructure provider offering elastic nodes for Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, and more.

seo.title: Chainstack — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Chainstack: Chainstack — Managed blockchain infrastructure provider offering elastic nodes for Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, and more.

when_to_use: Elastic Ethereum nodes for DApp with variable traffic
Polygon RPC for NFT marketplace backend
Solana dedicated node for high-frequency trading bot
Multi-chain node access with managed infrastructure
IPFS storage integration for decentralized app assets

pros: Good multichain coverage with elastic nodes
Dedicated node option at fair price
cons: Brand recognition behind Alchemy and Infura
review.verdict: A pragmatic Alchemy/Infura alternative, especially when data residency or dedicated nodes matter.
review.best_for: Dapps wanting dedicated blockchain nodes with EU residency or mid-market pricing
review.not_for: Teams that need the deepest enhanced APIs and biggest community

lock_in.reason: Standard RPC endpoints, easy to switch
